description: Season 12 update with major Season Point rebalancing, open-world fame system changes, Crystal League updates, and loot adjustments.

sections.heading: Season Point Changes
sections.description: Rebalanced Season Point rewards across activities.
items: Territory Season Points increased across all tiers
Castle Season Points increased across all tiers
Castle Outpost Season Points slightly increased
Bracket thresholds raised for Crystal, Gold, Silver, Bronze
sections.searchable_text: season points territory castle outpost thresholds

sections.heading: Open World Boss Location and Static Dungeon Changes
sections.description: New stacking Fame buff system tied to Elite mobs.
items: Elite mobs grant +1% Fame per kill up to +50%
World Bosses no longer grant flat 20% Fame
Buff applies only to nearby party members
Buff lost on death or zone change
Applies to open-world and static dungeon elite mobs
sections.searchable_text: fame buff elite mobs world boss stacking fame

sections.heading: 20v20 Crystal League Changes
sections.description: Adjustments to scoring, structure, and rewards.
items: Starting points increased from 200 to 250
Kill points increased from 1 to 2
Added new level between 1 and 2
All higher levels shifted up
Rewards and token prices adjusted

sections.heading: Treasure Chest Changes
sections.description: Loot adjustments for castle and outland chests.
items: Castle Chest loot value increased by ~100%
Added Tier 6-8 artifacts to castle chests
Outland chests spawn more frequently (60 minutes)
Outland chest loot reduced but can include T6-8 artifacts
sections.searchable_text: treasure chest loot castle outland artifacts

sections.heading: Guild Challenge Changes
sections.description: Reduced Season Points for lower guild challenge levels.
items: Significant reductions from levels 1 to 14
Level 15+ unchanged
Shift focus toward open-world objectives
sections.searchable_text: guild challenge season points reduction siphoned energy

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Map tooltips now show correct spawn intervals
Hideout home setting issue fixed
Non-Outlands mobs no longer grant Season Points
Fixed favorite islands removal issue
Lucent Hawk now hits correctly at long range
iOS avatar display issue fixed
Various graphical and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: fixes hideout map tooltip islands lucent hawk ios
